User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the TruckTrack application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

role.description: The role of the user (driver or admin).

status.description: The current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, pending).

Shipment.title: Shipment
Shipment.description: Represents a shipment in the TruckTrack application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Shipment entity.

orderCode.description: Unique order code for the shipment, used for customer tracking.

description.description: A brief description of the shipment contents.

notes.description: Special instructions or notes for the shipment.

assignedDriverId.description: Reference to User (Driver). The ID of the driver assigned to this shipment.

assignedDriverName.description: The name of the assigned driver (denormalized for convenience).

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the shipment was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the shipment was last updated.

currentStatus.description: The current status of the shipment.

statusTimestamps.description: JSON string representing an object where keys are status types and values are timestamps.

isCompleted.description: Indicates whether the shipment is completed.

origin.description: The origin address of the shipment.

destination.description: The destination address of the shipment.

expenses.description: A list of expenses related to the shipment.

StatusLog.title: StatusLog
StatusLog.description: Represents a log entry for a shipment status change.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StatusLog entity.

shipmentId.description: Reference to Shipment. The ID of the shipment this log entry belongs to.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when the status change occurred.

actorId.description: The ID of the user (driver or admin) who recorded the status change.

actorName.description: The name of the user who recorded the status change.

source.description: The source of the status change (driver or admin).

notes.description: Notes associated with the status log entry.

isFlagged.description: Indicates if the log entry has been flagged for correction.

isCorrection.description: Indicates if this log entry is an administrative correction.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate where the status was logged.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate where the status was logged.

definition.description: Stores user information, including drivers and admins.
Stores status log entries for a specific shipment.
